title: Zipfldr.dll
html:
Zipfldr.dll

Compressed Folder library

Execute

Launch an executable.

rundll32.exe zipfldr.dll,RouteTheCall {PATH:.exe}

Launch an executable payload by calling RouteTheCall. — MITRE: T1218.011 — Privileges: User

Launch an executable.

rundll32.exe zipfldr.dll,RouteTheCall file://^C^:^/^W^i^n^d^o^w^s^/^s^y^s^t^e^m^3^2^/^c^a^l^c^.^e^x^e

Launch an executable payload by calling RouteTheCall (obfuscated). — MITRE: T1218.011 — Privileges: User
